last_prompt: Research and design per-task timeout and auto-retry support for wreck-it. Review the Task struct in core/src/types.rs (or cli/src/types.rs) and the agent execution flow in cli/src/ralph_loop.rs and cli/src/agent.rs. Propose: (1) new optional Task fields `timeout_seconds: Option<u64>` and `max_retries: Option<u32>`, (2) how tokio::time::timeout wraps the agent call, (3) how the retry counter is tracked in task state without requiring a new state file (reuse or extend the existing failed_attempts field if present). Document the design with inline notes in a scratch section of this task's description or as comments in a new branch of the relevant source files.
